Reasoning: Based on the review of the debate summary, anodontia primarily affects the growth of the maxilla. This is supported by multiple references indicating reductions or deficiencies in the maxillary sinus floor and anterior aspects of the palate due to missing teeth. While mandibular retrusion can occur, the data leans more strongly toward maxillary involvement according to general trends in the reviewed literature. Therefore, option A (Maxilla) is the most appropriate answer. To further strengthen this conclusion, it's important to note that additional research or specific case studies could help solidify these findings, but based on the current evidence, option A remains the best choice. \boxed{A} Let me know if you have any other questions!
